name.description: The name of the report template

description.description: A description of the report template

body.description: The HTML/EJS template for the report body

header.description: The HTML/EJS template for the report header

footer.description: The HTML/EJS template for the report footer

status.description: The status of the report template

type.description: The type of the report template

form_id.description: The ID of the form this report template is associated with

hidden_fields.description: The list of fields to be hidden in the report

field.empty_value.description: The value to display for empty fields

header.form.name.description: Whether the form name is included in the header

header.record.id.description: Whether the record ID is included in the header

footer.timestamp.description: Whether the timestamp is included in the footer

footer.organization_image.description: Whether the organization image is included in the footer

footer.organization_info.description: Whether the organization info is included in the footer

footer.page_number.description: Whether the page number is included in the footer

cover_page.enabled.description: Whether the cover page is enabled

cover_page.form.name.description: Whether the form name is included on the cover page

cover_page.form.description.description: Whether the form description is included on the cover page

cover_page.form.image.description: Whether the form image is included on the cover page

cover_page.title.description: Whether the cover page title is included

cover_page.timestamp.description: Whether the timestamp is included on the cover page

cover_page.image.enabled.description: Whether images are enabled on the cover page

cover_page.image.caption.description: Whether captions are included for images on the cover page

cover_page.map.enabled.description: Whether maps are enabled on the cover page

cover_page.map.repeatables.description: Whether repeatable items are included on the cover page map

cover_page.map.type.description: The type of map to use on the cover page (e.g., roadmap)

cover_page.map.size.description: The size of the map on the cover page

cover_page.metadata.enabled.description: Whether metadata is enabled on the cover page

cover_page.metadata.created.description: Whether the creation metadata is included on the cover page

cover_page.metadata.updated.description: Whether the update metadata is included on the cover page

cover_page.metadata.status.description: Whether the status metadata is included on the cover page

cover_page.metadata.location.description: Whether the location metadata is included on the cover page

cover_page.metadata.project.description: Whether the project metadata is included on the cover page

cover_page.metadata.assigned.description: Whether the assigned metadata is included on the cover page

options.description: Available options for the parameter - can be array, object, or null

query.description: Query to filter available options - can be string, object, or null

default.description: Default value(s) for the parameter - can be any type
